arts.ttl: "It's a crazy game!" - Cheltenham Town defender Tom Bradbury on late winner and overcoming adversity - Gloucestershire Live
arts.sum: It took him a long time to work his way back into Wade Elliott’s starting XI, but he eventually played a major role in some of the best results of the season, scoring a right-footed volley in the 3-0 win at Peterborough United and starting the creditable home draws with Sheffield Wednesday and Ipswich Town. “Initially I was thinking ‘I’ve just scored, what’s going on?’ but our fans make a bit of noise in Block 1, so I ran over,” Bradbury said.
